content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be structured as a graded curiosity filter that retains only the information that would have generated high intrinsic reward under either ICM or RND curiosity frameworks, pruning low-curiosity outdated memory entries to preserve retrieval speed and planning accuracy. This creates a self-sustaining active learning loop where the agent’s memory automatically curates itself to prioritize the high-uncertainty information that drives further exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
